name: k0d3
description: valksor's consolidated skills, agents, commands, and hooks — single source of truth, now for Codex too.

interface.shortDescription: Skills, agents-as-skills, and bundled MCP servers for engineering work.
interface.longDescription: valksor's consolidated engineering toolkit: language/runtime/database/domain skills, reviewer and expert personas reframed as skills, plus bundled MCP servers (context7, memory, sequential-thinking, codegraph). Hooks are installed separately via scripts/install-codex-hooks.sh — the plugin deliberately ships no plugin-channel hooks (the `hooks` pointer is an empty file) because the scripts need a project-dir env the installer's shim provides.
